title: Pan-Seared Fish with Apple Cider Glaze
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared fish with a sweet and tangy apple cider glaze. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add fish fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While fish is cooking, combine cider, vinegar, and savory in a small saucepan.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Brush glaze over fish during last minute of cooking.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced apple.
